item.title: Shakshuka 🍅🍳 One of my all time favorites Ingredients -Red bel...
item.description:
Full post Embed


Shakshuka 🍅🍳 One of my all time favorites Ingredients -Red bell pepper -Onion -Tomatoes (I used a mix of fresh and fire roasted canned tomatoes) -Garlic -Paprika -Coriander -Cumin seeds / ground cumin -Chili powder -Oregano -Salt -Eggs Toppings -Parsley -Mint -Yogurt Serve with some crusty bread or pita!
#cooking #shakshuka #recipe #breakfast

item.title: Parmigiana di melanzane🍆🍅 Straight from the garden for Mami Ing...
item.description:
Full post Embed


Parmigiana di melanzane🍆🍅 Straight from the garden for Mami Ingredients -Eggplant -Fresh tomatoes, Passata, Pomodorini… depends on preference and availability (: -Mozzarella -Parmigiano Reggiano DOP -Basil -Salt -Black Pepper -Flour -Frying Oil -Extra Virgin Olive Oil
#cooking #recipe #italy #eggplant #parmigiano #travel

item.title: Tortilla Española 🇪🇸 INGREDIENTS For the Tortilla -500 g Yukon G...
item.description:
Full post Embed


Tortilla Española 🇪🇸 INGREDIENTS For the Tortilla -500 g Yukon Gold potatoes -1 or 2 large onions depending on your love of onion (onions are optional but my preference) -6 whole eggs + 3 yolks -Extra virgin olive oil -Salt For the Chorizo topping -Cured or semi-cured Spanish chorizo -1 tbsp tomato paste -1 garlic clove -1 tsp sherry vinegar -1 tbsp olive oil For the Aioli -2 egg yolks -3/4 - 1 cup neutral oil (I use avocado oil) -2 garlic cloves, mashed into a paste -2 tsp lemon juice -½ tsp smoked paprika (optional) -Pinch of salt
#cooking #tortilla #española #eggs #huevos

item.title: CHICKEN MARSALA Ingredients -For the chicken: -2 chicken breast...
item.description:
Full post Embed


CHICKEN MARSALA Ingredients -For the chicken: -2 chicken breasts -½ cup all-purpose flour -1 tsp salt -½ tsp black pepper (few good cracks of pepper all over) -Garlic -2-3 tbsp olive oil -2 tbsp unsalted butter For the sauce: -Mushrooms of choice (ie: Cremini, white button) -Shallot -Garlic -Dry Marsala wine -Chicken broth -Heavy cream -A few sprigs of fresh thyme -Rosemary -Bay leaf -Salt -Black pepper -Knob of butter -Parsley
#dinner #pasta #chickenmarsala

item.title: SPATCHCOCK CHICKEN With Calabrian-Garlic Compound Butter 🌶️ Full...
item.description:
Full post Embed


SPATCHCOCK CHICKEN With Calabrian-Garlic Compound Butter 🌶️ Full recipe on my substack! Ingredients -Whole chicken -Salt -Black pepper -Butter -Garlic -Lemon zest -Rosemary -Dried Oregano -Calabrian chili peppers -Extra virgin olive oil -Optional: smoked paprika For the roast: -Carrots -Potatoes -Fennel bulb -Red onion -Lemons -Dry white wine or broth -Salt -Black pepper -Extra virgin olive oil I then made a sauce with the pan drippings + parsley + Calabrian peppers + butter + splash of red wine vinegar
#roastchicken #dinnerrecipes #fall

item.title: EMPANADAS 🇦🇷 INGREDIENTS -Onion -Bell pepper -Cumin -Oregano -...
item.description:
Full post Embed


EMPANADAS 🇦🇷 INGREDIENTS -Onion -Bell pepper -Cumin -Oregano - Ají molido or cayenne -Paprika -Tomato paste -Ground beef -Green olives -Raisins -Hard boiled eggs -Raisins -Salt -Black pepper -Oil, beef tallow, or lard For the dough -AP Flour -Salt -Beef tallow, butter, or lard -Warm water
#empanadas #argentina #cooking

item.title: BUFFALO FRIED CHICKEN SANDWICH🌶️🥵 Ingredients For the Buttermilk...
item.description:
Full post Embed


BUFFALO FRIED CHICKEN SANDWICH🌶️🥵 Ingredients For the Buttermilk Brine Chicken thighs Buttermilk Pickle juice Hot sauce (homemade or Frank’s RedHot) Salt Black pepper Garlic powder Onion powder Paprika Cayenne pepper For Dredging the Chicken All-purpose flour Cornstarch Salt Black pepper Garlic powder  1 tsp onion powder  1 tsp smoked paprika  ½ tsp cayenne pepper For the Buffalo Sauce Cayenne peppers Fresno chiles Habanero peppers (adjust to heat preference) Thai chiles if you want it very spicy Garlic cloves White vinegar Salt Unsalted butter Worcestershire sauce For the Cabbage & Celery Slaw Green cabbage Celery Fresh lemon juice Dijon mustard Honey Salt Black pepper Dash of evoo (optional)  For the Blue Cheese Ranch Mayonnaise Sour cream Buttermilk Lemon juice Garlic clove or powder Chives Parsley Dill Blue cheese (finely grated or crumbled) Worcestershire sauce Salt Black pepper For Serving 4 brioche buns Butter for toasting buns Pickles Enjoy!
#buffalochicken #friedchicken #cooking #gameday #tailgate

item.title: Tiramisu 🍫☕️ Ingredients For the Ladyfingers (Savoiardi): Eggs ...
item.description:
Full post Embed


Tiramisu 🍫☕️ Ingredients For the Ladyfingers (Savoiardi): Eggs  Granulated sugar  AP Flour Powdered sugar (for dusting) Vanilla extract For the Espresso Soak/Mix: Fresh espresso  Sugar Nutmeg Marsala wine or dark rum (optional) For the filling: Egg yolks Granulated sugar Mascarpone cheese  Heavy cream For finishing: Unsweetened cocoa powder
#tiramisu #dessert #baking #recipe #autumn

item.title: CHICKEN PARM SANDWICH 🥖 Ingredients For the chicken cutlets: 2 b...
item.description:
Full post Embed


CHICKEN PARM SANDWICH 🥖 Ingredients For the chicken cutlets: 2 boneless and skinless chicken breasts   Kosher salt   Freshly ground black pepper   ½ cup all-purpose flour   2 eggs   ½ cup panko breadcrumbs + ½ cup Italian finely ground breadcrumbs   ⅓ cup finely grated Parmesan   A few good glugs of olive oil and/or neutral oil for frying   ⅓ cup potato starch   ½ tablespoon garlic powder   ½ tablespoon onion powder   ½ tbs dried thyme For the tomato sauce: 3-4 tablespoons of olive oil 2 garlic cloves, smashed 1 (28 oz) can San Marzano tomatoes Salt Freshly ground black pepper Optional: 1–2 teaspoons Calabrian chili paste or chopped Calabrian chilis For the tomato-garlic confit: 1 pint of small tomatoes (such as cherry, grape, campari, datterini, or sun gold) 1 head garlic ¾ cup olive oil Kosher salt For the pesto: 1 big old bunch of basil 2-3 garlic cloves ¼ c pine nuts  ⅓ cup grated Parmigiano Reggiano ¼ cup extra virgin olive oil Salt  For the sandwich assembly: Bread of choice Fresh mozzarella Extra Parmesan for topping Full recipe can be found on my substack, link in bio!
#chickenparm #sandwich #cooking
